title: The Understudy WIP
description: Work-in-progress build of The Understudy, a new playable character for Slay the Spire 2. Shared for friend testing. Requires BaseLib.
changeNote: v1.10.13 - New mechanic Swap: give your swappable debuffs to ALL enemies and steal their swappable buffs. New universal buff/debuff pairs Tension/Untension (end of turn: take damage / heal, then removed). Vigor is now invertible via negative values (reduces the next Attack); Tainted is now swappable and gains an Untainted inverse (take less Attack damage). Placeholder card Role Reversal. Requires BaseLib.
